---
title: "Tools"
---

Interactive widgets from the course catalog and standalone explorations.

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED TOOLS -->
### differential privacy

- **[Gaussian privacy tradeoff](content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/apps/privacy-plot-norm-6197737a49/)** — from Lecture 03 · DP as Hypothesis Testing
- **[Multi-distribution privacy tradeoff](content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/apps/privacy-plot-norm-laplace-uniform-06b3767cd2/)** — from Lecture 03 · DP as Hypothesis Testing
- **[Privacy Tradeoff Explorer](tools/privacy-tradeoff-explorer/)** — standalone — Explore how noise scale and distribution shape the privacy tradeoff curve.
- **[reconstruction-2d-slab](content/lectures/02-reconstruction/apps/reconstruction-2d-slab/)** — from Lecture 02 · Reconstruction attacks
- **[reconstruction-3d-slabs](content/lectures/02-reconstruction/apps/reconstruction-3d-slabs/)** — from Lecture 02 · Reconstruction attacks

### hypothesis testing

- **[Gaussian privacy tradeoff](content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/apps/privacy-plot-norm-6197737a49/)** — from Lecture 03 · DP as Hypothesis Testing
- **[Multi-distribution privacy tradeoff](content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/apps/privacy-plot-norm-laplace-uniform-06b3767cd2/)** — from Lecture 03 · DP as Hypothesis Testing
- **[Privacy Tradeoff Explorer](tools/privacy-tradeoff-explorer/)** — standalone — Explore how noise scale and distribution shape the privacy tradeoff curve.

### reconstruction attacks

- **[reconstruction-2d-slab](content/lectures/02-reconstruction/apps/reconstruction-2d-slab/)** — from Lecture 02 · Reconstruction attacks
- **[reconstruction-3d-slabs](content/lectures/02-reconstruction/apps/reconstruction-3d-slabs/)** — from Lecture 02 · Reconstruction attacks
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED TOOLS -->
